title: AntiSnowlag
description: AntiSnowlag automatically detects and removes snowball projectiles before they can cause massive lag or server crashes.
body:
AntiSnowlag automatically protects your server from severe lag caused by snowballs. Perfect for public servers where players use Snow Golems or snowballs to intentionally reduce TPS.

**Features:**

* **Automatic Detection:** Snowball projectiles are instantly identified.
* **Instant Removal:** Lag-causing snowballs are removed before they impact performance.
* **Stable Performance:** Helps prevent server crashes and keeps TPS consistent.
* **Easy Installation:** Compatible with common Minecraft versions, no complex setup required.

Keep your server running smoothly—AntiSnowlag works quietly in the background to prevent player-induced lag.
